records.question: Which buildings named Floridan Hotel at 905 Franklin Street have exactly 17 floors, were tallest from 1926–1966, and are at least 204 feet tall?

SELECT building.building_id FROM building

  AND building.Street_address = '905 Franklin Street'
  AND building.Floors = 17
  AND building.Years_as_tallest = '1926–1966'
  AND building.Height_feet >= 204

records.question: Which buildings belong to institutions where the team is Fighting Indians?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
JOIN institution ON building.building_id = institution.building_id
WHERE institution.team = 'Fighting Indians'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT building.building_id
FROM building
JOIN Institution ON building.building_id = Institution.building_id
WHERE Institution.Team = 'Fighting Indians'

records.question: Which buildings that were the tallest exactly during 1966–1972 have a height of at most 280 feet?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
WHERE building.height_feet <= 280 AND building.years_as_tallest = '1966–1972'
records.pred_sql: SELECT building_id FROM building WHERE Years_as_tallest = '1966-1972' AND Height_feet <= 280

records.question: Which building named 100 North Tampa located at 100 North Tampa Street is 579 feet tall, has at most 42 floors, and has been the tallest since 1992–present?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT building.building_id FROM building
WHERE building.years_as_tallest = '1992–present' AND building.height_feet = 579 AND building.name = '100 North Tampa' AND building.floors <= 42 AND building.street_address = '100 North Tampa Street'
